summary: Session 4 close. M0-T005 ACCEPTED (G2/G3/G5; scan workflow live+green). M0-T009 ACCEPTED (G2/G3/G4/G5; contracts v1 merged; CI runner jsonschema 4.10.3 discovery raised R1 item 10).
